## devbox down

Stop and remove compose services

### Synopsis

Stop and remove all compose containers, networks, and volumes defined in the project.

Equivalent to running 'devbox docker down' with the resolved compose files and project name.

```
devbox down [flags]
```

### Examples

```
  devbox down
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for down
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -c, --config string   path to devbox.yml (default "devbox.yml")
```
